items.title: Amazon's Zoox Plans To Launch Robotaxi Service This Year
items.author: Erica Kollmann
items.description: Zoox, a robotaxi company owned by Amazon, plans to launch its autonomous vehicle ride-hailing service in Las Vegas this year, starting with an 'Early Rider Program' in the next few months and opening to the general public later in 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Amazon acquired Zoox in 2020, indicating their interest and investment in the robotaxi technology and service.

items.title: Prediction: This Top Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Will Join the $3 Trillion Club in 2026
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The article predicts that Amazon (AMZN) could reach a $3 trillion market cap by 2026, driven by its strong position in e-commerce and cloud computing, as well as its growing AI capabilities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article suggests that Amazon is well-positioned to continue its growth in e-commerce and cloud computing, and its investments in AI could further boost its market cap to reach $3 trillion by 2026.
The article mentions that Apple is one of the three $3 trillion companies, indicating its strong performance in the AI and technology sector.
The article also lists Nvidia as one of the $3 trillion companies, highlighting its success in the AI and technology industry.
Microsoft is mentioned as the third $3 trillion company, demonstrating its dominance in the technology and AI space.
